name: Hilton Grand Vacations Inc.
business: Hilton Grand Vacations Inc. is a global timeshare company that develops, markets, sells, manages, and operates timeshare resorts and plans, primarily under the Hilton Grand Vacations brands. It sells vacation ownership interests (VOIs) to consumers and provides financing, resort management, club management, and rental services. As of December 31, 2025, it had over 720,000 members across its Club offerings.
sellsTo: Existing timeshare owners (74% of contract sales in 2025)
International travelers (United States, Europe, Canada, Caribbean, Mexico, Asia)

exposures.sentence: Cyber-attacks or our failure to maintain the security and integrity of company, employee, customer or third-party data;
Our business depends on the quality and reputation of the Hilton brands and affiliation with the Hilton Honors loyalty program.

catalysts.event: Cumulative rebranding target milestone for Diamond properties
catalysts.sentence: If we fail to achieve certain cumulative target milestones by September 30, 2031 in the case of Diamond properties or by September 30, 2032 in the case of Bluegreen properties and the shortage is more than approximately 10% in either case, Hilton has the right, by notice to us, to prohibit our sale of future offering of HGV Max.

catalysts.event: Cumulative rebranding target milestone for Bluegreen properties
catalysts.sentence: If we fail to achieve certain cumulative target milestones by September 30, 2031 in the case of Diamond properties or by September 30, 2032 in the case of Bluegreen properties and the shortage is more than approximately 10% in either case, Hilton has the right, by notice to us, to prohibit our sale of future offering of HGV Max.
